note: Analysis based on AMIT-SITE codebase which faithfully replicates normalisboring.es (v2 editorial-kinetic monochrome experience)

cursorBlob.behavior: Fixed position circular dot that follows the mouse with a soft lag (lerp 0.15). Expands from 12px to 46px when hovering interactive elements. Can display a label from data-cursor-label attribute. Native cursor stays visible for accessibility.

implementation.method: CSS positioned div + GSAP ticker for smooth following

js.hoverDetection: Checks closest() for 'a, button, [data-cursor], input, textarea, select'

framesAnimation.note: The site uses scroll-triggered reveals rather than stacked fixed-position frame layers

implementation.scrollTriggers: GSAP ScrollTrigger for individual element animations
effects: Fade + rise reveals (Reveal component: y: 28px, opacity 0->1)
Word-by-word masked text reveals (RevealText: yPercent 115->0, staggered)
Line-by-line masked reveals (RevealLines: using GSAP SplitText)
Parallax images (useParallax: yPercent scrub on scroll)
implementation.sectionTheming: Sections use data-theme='cream|ink|paper' for color alternation, header adapts via IntersectionObserver

hoverStates.css: transition-transform duration-700 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)] group-hover:scale-[1.03] or scale-[1.04]

hoverStates.effect: Text slides up to reveal duplicate copy

otherFeatures.name: Smooth Scroll
otherFeatures.description: Lenis library for buttery smooth scroll

implementation.integration: Wired to GSAP ticker and ScrollTrigger.update

implementation.effect: Full-screen ink-colored div slides from bottom to top (y: 100% -> 0% -> -100%)
Dark curtain with animated logo + progress line, slides up to reveal

otherFeatures.name: Typography
otherFeatures.description: High-contrast serif + sans pairing, oversized editorial scale

implementation.displayFont: Bodoni Moda (LTR) / Frank Ruhl Libre (RTL) via font-display class
implementation.mixedType: Uppercase sans + italic serif emphasis word (LTR only, Hebrew uses weight contrast)

otherFeatures.name: Color System
otherFeatures.description: Near-monochrome palette with single sage accent

implementation.sage: #6E8B7B (accent - used sparingly: dot, (R) mark, hover states only)

implementation.RevealLines: Line-by-line with SplitText (LTR only, RTL renders plain)
implementation.useParallax: yPercent scrub animation tied to scroll position

implementation.corners: No rounded corners except pill buttons (rounded-full)
implementation.accentDot: .accent-dot: 8px sage circle, absolute positioned as visual punctuation
